name: @borjie/graph-rag-router
description: GraphRAG router (Wave 18BB) — hierarchical retrieval substrate that classifies queries (vector / graph_local / graph_global / hybrid) and runs the right backend. Implements Microsoft GraphRAG-style entity + relation extraction, Louvain/Leiden community detection, LLM-driven community summarisation, and reciprocal-rank-fusion hybrid retrieval. Closes the founder-flagged P0 gap where pgvector carried queries it could not structurally answer. See Docs/DESIGN/GRAPH_RAG_ROUTER_SPEC.md.
